diagram_title: Builder Native Beta 工作流程

activities.title: Approve 建置 項目
activities.description: Validate planner artifacts 與 approve beta-aware 建置 項目 through existing builder 控制 plane

activities.title: Execute Beta Branch Work
activities.description: Create 或 reuse beta branch/worktree 與 perform routine implementation git flow inside builder

activities.title: Validate Mainline Integration
activities.description: Sync feature branch 回到 到 main repo, 執行 runtime validation, 與 prepare 合併 preflight
